notableEvents.label: Adley Rutschman GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Adley Rutschman grounds into a double play, second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr. to shortstop José Caballero to first baseman Paul Goldschmidt. Blaze Alexander to 3rd. Gunnar Henderson out at 2nd. Adley Rutschman out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Adley Rutschman rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Adley Rutschman grounds into a double play, second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr. to shortstop José Caballero to first baseman Paul Goldschmidt. Blaze Alexander to 3rd. Gunnar Henderson out at 2nd. Adley Rutschman out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Trent Grisham doubles (5) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Leody Taveras. Trent Grisham to 3rd. Trent Grisham advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by center fielder Leody Taveras.

notableEvents.label: Blaze Alexander GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Blaze Alexander grounds into a double play, shortstop José Caballero to second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr. to first baseman Paul Goldschmidt. Colton Cowser to 3rd. Jeremiah Jackson out at 2nd. Blaze Alexander out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Blaze Alexander rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Blaze Alexander grounds into a double play, shortstop José Caballero to second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr. to first baseman Paul Goldschmidt. Colton Cowser to 3rd. Jeremiah Jackson out at 2nd. Blaze Alexander out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Aaron Judge GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Aaron Judge grounds into a double play, second baseman Jeremiah Jackson to first baseman Pete Alonso. Trent Grisham out at 2nd. Aaron Judge out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Yankees challenged (tag play), call on the field was overturned: Wild pitch by pitcher Shane Baz. Jasson Domínguez scores. Jazz Chisholm Jr. to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run
